# Project Skills

This directory contains project-scoped Copilot skills.

## Available Skills
- `cert-lifecycle-nginx-certbot`
- `pipeline-consistency-audit`
- `vault-vars-contract-check`
- `concourse-release-gate-validator`
- `safe-fly-deploy-playbook`

## Invocation
Use natural language, or invoke directly in chat with `/` and the skill name.

Examples:
- `/cert-lifecycle-nginx-certbot infra-nginx and infra-certbot`
- `/pipeline-consistency-audit compare production and staging nginx pipelines`
- `/vault-vars-contract-check check vars for ci/pipelines/infra-nginx.yml`
